'''pagoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:waddling|waddling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waddling|waddling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pagoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pægeseth|pægeseth]] || [[word:pægesej|pægesej]] || [[word:pægesesh|pægesesh]] || [[word:pægese|pægese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pagogosoth|pagogosoth]] || [[word:pagogosoj|pagogosoj]] || [[word:pagogososh|pagogososh]] || [[word:pagogoso|pagogoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pagosoth|pagosoth]] || [[word:pagosoj|pagosoj]] || [[word:pagososh|pagososh]] || [[word:pagoso|pagoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pagofsoth|pagofsoth]] || [[word:pagofsoj|pagofsoj]] || [[word:pagofsosh|pagofsosh]] || [[word:pagofsof|pagofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pagosotho|pagosotho]] || [[word:pagosojo|pagosojo]] || [[word:pagososho|pagososho]] || [[word:pagosoko|pagosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pagosoth|pagosoth]] || [[word:pagosoj|pagosoj]] || [[word:pagososh|pagososh]] || [[word:pagoso|pagoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pagosothol|pagosothol]] || [[word:pagosojol|pagosojol]] || [[word:pagososhol|pagososhol]] || [[word:pagosokol|pagosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pagosothotho|pagosothotho]] || [[word:pagosojojo|pagosojojo]] || [[word:pagososhosho|pagososhosho]] || [[word:pagosoko|pagosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pagosothon|pagosothon]] || [[word:pagosojon|pagosojon]] || [[word:pagososhon|pagososhon]] || [[word:pagosokon|pagosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pagosothoro|pagosothoro]] || [[word:pagosojoro|pagosojoro]] || [[word:pagososhoro|pagososhoro]] || [[word:pagosokoro|pagosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
